title: Magic Modification
description: A Mod with a bunchof cool Stuff with the main Focus on Magic
body:
# Magic Mod

This Mod adds a Magic System to the game, in which you can select a Magic Class and use the Spells of that Class. By doing so you Level up your Skill which allows you to use more spells and stronger spells.

But watch out that you don't drain your MANA too quickly. But don't worry, there are ways to increase your MANA, for example with Armor, Swords or Potions Temporary.
Or you can just use one Time spells which don't drain your MANA.

Explore the World and take a Stop at the custom Structures and Dungeons being added which contains rare loot so use but also having different Bosses which are not Easy to defeat.

Furthermore, the mod adds some weapons, a new Money System, and Custom Tools and Weapons which can be used in a lot of different ways.
But if you take a closer look at your weapons, they could contain different powerful abilities.
And if you are not a fan of the close combat, the Bows can be just for you.
As Well as some new Potions and Enchantments which can be used Positively and negatively towards you and other Players or Mobs to help in combat or annoy the Other person.

It is recommended to use JEI or any Alternative so you can quickly learn the Recipes the mod uses to craft and process different Items.
